creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ruby 1.9 has been the "recommended" version from upstream for a while now.
Would like to make it the default before 9.0. Attaching patch to make it so.
Requesting -exp run to figure out which things break. This also updates
lang/ruby19 to patchlevel 180 which is the current recommended version. And I
was forced to remove rubygems and rake from the 1.9 language package since it
is an old version and we have the newer one in ports and because some ports and
gems need the newer version.

Fix: Please see attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
